title: Add optional spec.uwsgi field to Keystone CRD for tunable uWSGI workers
description:
**Size:** 📦 medium
**Category:** backend
**Priority:** medium
**Source:** Proposed for 'Make uwsgi flags configurable via the CRD or a con'

Add a new UWSGISpec struct (Processes int32 min=1 default=2, Threads int32 min=1 default=2, HTTPKeepAlive bool default=true) to api/v1alpha1/keystone_types.go as an optional *UWSGISpec pointer field on KeystoneSpec, following the existing *FederationSpec/*PolicySpec pattern. Wire webhook defaulting in KeystoneWebhook.Default() for zero-valued sub-fields when spec.uwsgi is non-nil. Modify buildKeystoneDeployment in reconcile_deployment.go to read keystone.Spec.UWSGI and construct the uWSGI command dynamically, falling back to current hardcoded defaults (processes=2, threads=2, keepalive=true) when the field is nil. Regenerate CRD manifests via make generate && make manifests. Add table-driven unit tests in reconcile_deployment_test.go covering nil uwsgi (defaults preserved), custom values, and keepalive on/off. Add integration test verifying Deployment container args reflect CRD uwsgi values.

**Rationale:** The uWSGI worker processes, threads, and HTTP keep-alive flags are currently hardcoded at reconcile_deployment.go:157-168. Operators running Keystone under varying load profiles cannot tune connection concurrency without modifying operator source code and rebuilding. Exposing these as CRD fields gives platform teams a declarative, auditable knob for performance tuning while preserving safe defaults for standard deployments.

**Affected Areas:**
- operators/keystone/api/v1alpha1/keystone_types.go
- operators/keystone/api/v1alpha1/keystone_webhook.go
- operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_deployment.go
- operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_deployment_test.go
- operators/keystone/config/crd/bases/
elaboration:
**Size:** 🔨 medium
**Category:** backend
**Priority:** medium

---

## Summary

This feature adds an optional `spec.uwsgi` pointer field to the Keystone CRD, allowing operators to tune uWSGI worker processes, threads, and HTTP keep-alive behavior without modifying operator source code. The `buildKeystoneDeployment` function (currently hardcoding `--processes 2 --threads 2 --http-keepalive` at `reconcile_deployment.go:157-168`) will read these values from the CR spec, falling back to sensible defaults when the field is nil.

---

## Scope

**Included:**
- New `UWSGISpec` struct with `Processes` (int32, default 2), `Threads` (int32, default 2), `HTTPKeepAlive` (bool, default true) in `api/v1alpha1/keystone_types.go`
- Optional pointer field `UWSGI *UWSGISpec` on `KeystoneSpec`, following the established `*FederationSpec` / `*PolicySpec` pattern
- Kubebuilder markers for validation (`+kubebuilder:validation:Minimum=1` for processes/threads) and defaults
- Webhook defaulting in `keystone_webhook.go` `Default()` method — populate `UWSGISpec` defaults when the field is set but sub-fields are zero-valued, consistent with the existing `Replicas`/`Fernet`/`Cache` defaulting pattern
- `buildKeystoneDeployment` modified to read `keystone.Spec.UWSGI` and construct the uWSGI command dynamically, using hardcoded defaults when nil
- CRD regeneration (`make generate && make manifests`)
- Unit tests in `reconcile_deployment_test.go` covering: nil uwsgi (defaults), custom values, keepalive on/off — following the existing fake-client + Gomega assertion pattern
- Integration test verifying Deployment container args reflect CRD uwsgi values

**Excluded:**
- ConfigMap-based uWSGI configuration (CRD field is the established pattern, YAGNI)
- Free-form `extraArgs` escape hatch (YAGNI — no current need for obscure flags)
- Exposing invariant flags (`--master`, `--lazy-apps`, `--need-app`, `--wsgi-file`, `--pyargv`) — these are tied to the container image and have no operator-facing use case
- Listen address/port configuration (port 5000 is part of the Service contract, changing it breaks Service/Endpoint wiring)
- Gunicorn support or WSGI server selection (not implemented, out of scope)
- CRD reference doc update (`docs/reference/keystone-crd.md`) — tracked separately if needed

---

## Visualization

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    CR["Keystone CR"] -->|"spec.uwsgi"| Reconciler["reconcileDeployment"]
    Reconciler --> Build["buildKeystoneDeployment"]
    Build -->|"nil? use defaults"| Defaults["processes=2, threads=2, keepalive=true"]
    Build -->|"non-nil? use spec"| Custom["spec.uwsgi.processes / threads / httpKeepAlive"]
    Defaults --> Cmd["uWSGI Command Construction"]
    Custom --> Cmd
    Cmd --> Deploy["Deployment Container Args"]
```

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    subgraph CRD["KeystoneSpec"]
        Replicas["replicas: int32"]
        Image["image: ImageSpec"]
        UWSGI["uwsgi: *UWSGISpec"]
        Fed["federation: *FederationSpec"]
        Other["...existing fields"]
    end

    subgraph UWSGISpec
        Proc["processes: int32 #40;min 1, default 2#41;"]
        Thr["threads: int32 #40;min 1, default 2#41;"]
        KA["httpKeepAlive: bool #40;default true#41;"]
    end

    UWSGI --> UWSGISpec
```

---

## Key Components

- **`UWSGISpec` struct** (`api/v1alpha1/keystone_types.go`): New type with `Processes`, `Threads`, `HTTPKeepAlive` fields, kubebuilder default/validation markers. Follows the existing `FederationSpec` pointer-for-optional pattern.
- **`KeystoneSpec.UWSGI`** (`api/v1alpha1/keystone_types.go`): Optional pointer field `*UWSGISpec` with `+optional` and `json:"uwsgi,omitempty"` tags.
- **`KeystoneWebhook.Default()`** (`api/v1alpha1/keystone_webhook.go`): Defaulting logic for zero-valued sub-fields when `spec.uwsgi` is non-nil, consistent with existing `Replicas`/`Fernet`/`Cache` defaulting.
- **`buildKeystoneDeployment`** (`internal/controller/reconcile_deployment.go`): Modified to read `keystone.Spec.UWSGI` and construct the command dynamically — replaces the hardcoded `--processes 2 --threads 2 --http-keepalive` block at lines 157-168. When nil, emits the same defaults as today.
- **Unit tests** (`internal/controller/reconcile_deployment_test.go`): Table-driven tests using the existing fake-client + Gomega pattern for nil/custom/edge-case uwsgi spec.
- **CRD manifests**: Regenerated via `make generate && make manifests`.
